  • Uses of Rule in de.ddb.labs.timeparser

    Methods in de.ddb.labs.timeparser that return types with arguments of type Rule
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Rule>
    TimeParser.findMatchingRules(String tokenizedInput)
    Finds all rules whose input mask matches the given tokenized input (step 3 of the pipeline).
    List<Rule>
    TimeParser.getRules()
    Returns all loaded transformation rules.
    Methods in de.ddb.labs.timeparser with parameters of type Rule
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    TimeParser.applyRule(String input, Rule rule)
    Applies a selected rule to the raw input and produces the normalized parser expression (step 4 of the pipeline).
